_description: Extracted from motorola/mb7621 modem.har: restart POST observed in traffic, and the preceding page embeds a form (unquoted attributes) whose action equals the observed endpoint — the page is the pre_fetch_url. Form action has no query token, so no endpoint_pattern.

content.text:
<html><body>
<form action=/goform/MotoSecurity method=POST name="MotoSecurity">
<input type="hidden" name="MotoSecurityAction" value="0">
</form>
</body></html>
